# Sujal Sule

> Full-Stack Software Engineer & Creative Developer specializing in high-performance web systems and high-fidelity cinematic UI.

## Profile Summary
Sujal Sule is a creative software engineer building modern, interactive, and highly scalable digital systems. With deep expertise in frontend architectures (React, Framer Motion, React Three Fiber, WebGL) and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL), Sujal designs highly functional platforms that combine state-of-the-art aesthetics with technical robustness.

## Primary Domain
- [Website](https://sujalsule.in/)

## Social Profiles
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Sujal-Sule)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/sujal-sule)

## Technical Stack
- **Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, HTML5, CSS3, SQL
- **Frontend Ecosystem:** React, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, React Three Fiber, Three.js
- **Backend & Cloud:** Node.js, Express, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Vercel, Hostinger, Git

## Core Projects
- **SkillSwap:** Subdomain: [skillswap.sujalsule.in](https://skillswap.sujalsule.in/). A modern collaborative platform for skill assessment and direct knowledge sharing.
- **Arogya AI:** High-performance diagnosis platform utilizing AI endpoints and robust server-side schemas.
- **Origyn:** Decentralized web3 authentication and provenance system interface.

## Contact Information
- **Email:** sujalsule31@gmail.com
